Drafting Studio

Legal production engine for notices, replies, rebuttals, bilingual versions, structured drafts and advocate-reviewed outputs. Designed for daily drafting work across law firms and legal teams.

Commercial Drafting Flow
Basic draft - INR 299 | Strong rebuttal - INR 699 | Bilingual - INR 999 | Senior reviewed - INR 1499
